name: 1'8"x2'10" Flat Kitchen Rug Persian - Threshold™
description:
Create a welcoming kitchen space with this Persian Flat Kitchen Rug from Threshold™. This low-pile accent rug showcases a tufted construction with a Persian medallion design and matching border, adding a warm touch to any indoor space. Plus, it boasts latex backing for secure placement and offers functional style when placed in front of the sink or countertop.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
